violations.text: Inspector observed dead mouse in basement area. Dead rodents must be removed from establishment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and service areas were lacking paper towels. PIC refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
Hotel pan was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed pan. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Raw animal foods (such as raw eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as various beverage jellies) in the 2 door refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated raw eggs to bottom shelf. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 10 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC added additional chlorine. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took ice machine out of service to be washed/sanitized. PIC discarded ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Tapioca pearls (boba) was observed held at 126 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC turned up crockpot. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC labeled during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Various chemicals were observed stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. PIC relocated chemicals. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Inspector observed a sticky trap (on the floor) with a dead roach near the cash register area. Inspector observed two dead mice in basement area. Dead insects and rodents must be removed from establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
Ice cream scoop was observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC removed scoop and washed/sanitized it. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The basement floors and staircase have an accumulation of soil residue, old large and small rodent droppings, and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
